The '''Damorian Repair Yard''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] owned [[Repair Yard|repair yard]]. Situated near [[Draik 4]], it was attacked by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] pilots [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] and [[Olin Garn]] during Azzameen's first training and assessment mission as part of his joining the Alliance starfighter corps. The vessel that was docked there at the time, the [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] ''[[Sodrab]]'', was Azzameen's primary target and was destroyed.

==Behind the scenes==
Given the lack of the station's own defenses in the game, it is not overly difficult for the player to destroy the station, in addition to the ''Sodrab'', for 'bonus points'. As this is not part of the mission specifically, its destruction is not definite. However, given that a starship exploded while still docked, the facility would certainly have been damaged.
